narrative:
Linton / Plainfield (precinct in Coshocton County) has 439 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 30.5% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 17.5%, a pronounced Republican lean of 13.0 percentage points.
